body_txt: Any Phlebotinum that transforms someone(s) into something weird, usually by shooting them with a ray. It's often a machine, produced by a Mad Scientist , but Green Rocks are also common. At the end of the episode the same Phlebotinum is used to reverse the effects, or it simply wears off. Occasionally, it may be used in the first episode to set up the premise of the series, in which case, it doesn't wear off and/or can't be found for reversion . See also Forced Transformation . For an exceptionally common specific type of Transformation Ray, see Gender Bender . A Sub-Trope of Ray Gun . May be a type of Projectile Spell .
